title: DN-003: Trump Delays Iran Strikes — Gold Reverses Off $4,100
description: Gold plunged to $4,100 intraday before staging a dramatic reversal after Trump delayed strikes on Iran for five days to pursue peace talks. The dollar weakened, economic data disappointed, and RSI hit an extreme oversold level of 11. We cover the massive $437 intraday range, what peace talks mean for gold, key support and resistance levels, and the GCJ26 rollover deadline.
topics: Iran Peace Talks, Trump, Intraday Reversal, Oversold RSI, Dollar Weakness, GCJ26 Rollover, Technical Analysis

title: DN-002: Gold's Worst Week Since 1983 — Week in Review
description: Gold suffered an 11% weekly decline, the worst since 1983, despite the ongoing Iran conflict. This episode breaks down WHY: hawkish Fed policy killing rate cut expectations, a surging US dollar, and speculative unwinding. We cover the day-by-day action, key support and resistance levels, the technical picture, and what to watch next week including PCE data and the GCJ26 first notice day.
topics: Weekly Review, Iran War, Fed Policy, Interest Rates, Dollar Strength, Technical Levels, GCJ26 Rollover

title: MC-010: Technical Analysis — Reading Charts Like a Pro
description: Learn to read the story gold prices tell on a chart. Candlestick charts and key patterns (doji, hammer, engulfing), timeframes from 1-minute to weekly, support and resistance with real gold levels, trend lines and trend identification, moving averages (SMA, EMA, golden cross, death cross), and a full chart walkthrough.
topics: Candlesticks, Support/Resistance, Trend Lines, Moving Averages, Chart Patterns, Golden Cross

title: MC-009: Fundamental Analysis — What Moves Gold?
description: The forces that drive gold prices. Interest rates and the Fed, the US Dollar relationship, inflation indicators (CPI, PCE, PPI), geopolitical risk and the fear trade, central bank buying trends, supply and demand dynamics, and the key economic reports calendar every gold trader must follow.
topics: Fed Policy, Interest Rates, US Dollar, Inflation, Geopolitics, Central Banks, Economic Calendar

title: MC-008: Reading a Gold Futures Quote
description: Understand every number on a trading screen. Price fields (last, open, high, low, settlement), bid and ask spreads, volume and what it tells you, open interest and the four OI-price combinations, change and percent change, a complete quote walkthrough, and Level 2 market depth. Tier 2 graduation episode.
topics: Quote Reading, Bid/Ask, Volume, Open Interest, Market Depth, Settlement Price

title: MC-007: Order Types — How to Enter and Exit
description: Master every order type available for trading gold futures. Market orders for speed, limit orders for price control, stop-loss orders for protection, stop-limit orders for precision, bracket/OCO orders for complete trade management, and time-in-force options. Includes practical trade scenarios and common mistakes.
topics: Market Orders, Limit Orders, Stop-Loss, Stop-Limit, Bracket Orders, OCO, Time-in-Force

title: MC-006: Going Long vs Going Short
description: Learn the two fundamental trade directions. Going long (buying, betting price goes up) and going short (selling first, betting price goes down). Detailed worked examples with real gold prices, P&L formulas, interactive practice problems, when to choose each direction, and common beginner mistakes.
topics: Long, Short, P&L Calculation, Offsetting, Trade Direction, Beginner Mistakes

title: MC-005: Margin — Your Ticket to the Game
description: The most important concept for new traders. Learn what margin really is (a good-faith deposit, not a loan), initial vs maintenance margin, how $51,500 controls $457,500 of gold, the dreaded margin call, micro gold as a beginner-friendly option, and practical margin management rules.
topics: Margin, Leverage, Margin Call, Initial vs Maintenance, Micro Gold, Risk Management

title: MC-004: How Prices Move — Ticks, Points, and Dollar Value
description: Understand exactly how price movements translate to real money. Master ticks (the minimum $0.10 move = $10 per contract), points ($1.00 = $100), and work through detailed examples from $5 moves to $150 drops. Learn daily price limits, compare contract sizes, and how to read a price quote.
topics: Ticks, Points, Dollar Value, Price Limits, Contract Sizes, Price Quotes

title: MC-003: The Gold Futures Contract — Meet GC
description: Meet the actual contract you will be trading. Learn about COMEX, the 100-troy-ounce GC contract, what a troy ounce is, how to decode ticker symbols like GCJ26, contract months and letter codes, the contract lifecycle, rollovers, and smaller alternatives like micro gold for beginners.
topics: COMEX, GC Contract, Troy Ounce, Ticker Codes, Contract Months, Micro Gold

title: MC-002: Why Gold? The World's Favorite Metal
description: Discover why gold has captivated humanity for thousands of years. From ancient Egypt and King Tut's tomb to Fort Knox and modern central banks. Learn about gold's unique properties, the gold standard, Nixon Shock of 1971, who buys gold today, the safe-haven concept, and why gold futures beat gold bars and ETFs.
topics: Gold History, Safe Haven, Supply and Demand, Gold vs ETFs

title: MC-001: What Is a Futures Contract?
description: Your complete beginner guide to futures contracts. We break down what a futures contract is using simple analogies — from pre-ordering toys to a farmer selling wheat before harvest. Learn about buyers and sellers, expiration dates, delivery vs cash settlement, hedging vs speculation, and why futures markets exist.

title: DN-001: Gold Futures Market Recap
description: Complete intro to GCJ26 gold futures — contract specs, margin, leverage, momentum trading with RSI/MACD/ADX, ladder trading with order flow, and advanced concepts.
topics: ["Futures Basics","GCJ26 Specs","Momentum Trading","Ladder Trading","Order Flow","Risk Management"]
